'''''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi''''', also referred to as '''''Star Wars Trilogy: Return of the Jedi''''', is a [[Star Wars Legends|Legends]] junior novel written by [[Ryder Windham]], based on a screenplay by [[Lawrence Kasdan]] and [[George Lucas]]. It adapts the [[1983]] film [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']], and it was first published in [[October]] [[2004]] by [[Scholastic]].<ref name="Amazon" />

The novel was later collected in ''[[Star Wars Trilogy: Collector's Edition]]'' ([[2005]]), ''[[Star Wars Boxed Set: Episodes I–VI]]'' ([[2007]]), and ''[[Star Wars: Classic Trilogy]]'' ([[2014]]). A revised, [[canon]] edition of the novel, [[Star Wars: Return of the Jedi (paperback novel)|''Star Wars: Return of the Jedi'']], was published in 2017.<ref name="Disney" />

==Publisher's summary==
''A long time ago in a galaxy far, far away....''

''A rebellion makes its most desperate move. A galaxy hangs in the balance. A new Jedi rises. A circle is completed. The journey ends.''<ref name="Amazon" />
